translation.literal_translation: If it be said 'No, because the meter (chandas) is named,' no - because scripture states fixation of mind in that way; for so indeed it is seen. (25)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.1.25: chandas-reference does not block Brahman-reference; Gayatri serves as support for contemplative ceto-arpana toward Brahman.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra preserves symbolic-meter language while retaining Brahmanic purport.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S01 pass with stable inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit truncated source lines and precise phrasing in the jyotis/gayatri bridge and Kausitaki prana section (1.1.084-1.1.095).
